fitness_function.formula: cumulative_distance*30 + upright*0.3 + velocity*0.5 + time_alive*0.1 - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*100

result.gait_description: Places front foot forward, brings back foot to same position, repeats. Shuffle-walk pattern. No hopping. Sustained but slow.

diagnosis.problem: Score ~540 vs predicted ~1075 for a 2 m/s gait. Walker moves but very slowly — shuffle pattern with feet never overtaking each other.
root_cause_candidates: CPG oscillator frequency too slow — feet move cautiously rather than striding
Upright bonus (×0.3) still dominates velocity signal — walker prioritises balance over speed
Walker never learned to swing the rear leg past the front (no proper stride)
3 episodes × 1000 steps may not be enough signal for stride length learning

artifacts.fitness_curve_note: Not saved — fitness_curve_cpg.png was overwritten by exp003 before archiving.
